summary: The diff implements comprehensive responsive design updates across all frontend components with mobile optimizations including responsive typography, touch-friendly sizing (44px+ targets), mobile-optimized canvas animations (reduced particles, 30 FPS throttling), and responsive grid layouts (1/2/3 column breakpoints). All 11 requirements appear to be addressed with extensive evidence of mobile-first responsive design patterns.

hallucinated_features.description: Mobile device detection and performance optimization logic added to App.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not specify adding mobile device detection state or isMobile prop passing. While this supports REQ-11 performance optimizations, the specific implementation approach was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Generic type parameter changes to useScrollAnimation hook usage
hallucinated_features.reason: Multiple components show changes to ref typing (e.g., 'useScrollAnimation<HTMLElement>()' or 'useScrollAnimation<HTMLDivElement>()'). The BuildRequest does not mention refactoring hook type parameters.

hallucinated_features.description: Tailwind v3 class migration (flex-shrink-0 to shrink-0)
hallucinated_features.reason: Summary mentions updating to 'Tailwind v3 shrink-0 class' in multiple files. The BuildRequest constraints specify maintaining existing design aesthetic but do not request Tailwind version migration.

hallucinated_features.description: Fixed conflicting Tailwind classnames in ContactSection
hallucinated_features.reason: Summary mentions 'fixed conflicting Tailwind classnames' which implies bug fixes beyond the responsive design scope requested.
